title: lilium bulbiferum subsp. croceum
intro: Lilium bulbiferum subsp. croceum, also known as the Red Lily or Tiger Lily, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the lily family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its vibrant orange or red flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lilium bulbiferum subsp. croceum include its ability to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
